videos.title: Geolocation API - Web Dev Simplified
videos.description: Learn how to use the Geolocation API to get user coordinates, track position changes, and handle errors.

videos.title: HTML Geolocation API Tutorial - Traversy Media
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers the Geolocation API including getCurrentPosition, watchPosition, and integration with Google Maps.

videos.title: Geolocation API Basics - freeCodeCamp
videos.description: Learn the fundamentals of the Geolocation API, including permissions, accuracy, and fallback strategies.

videos.title: Reverse Geocoding with Geolocation - Kevin Powell
videos.description: Kevin Powell shows how to combine the Geolocation API with reverse geocoding to display human-readable addresses.

videos.title: Geolocation API Best Practices - Google Chrome Developers
videos.description: Best practices for using the Geolocation API, including permission handling, performance, and privacy considerations.
